positive: Minimalist woodland creature silhouette composition featuring a stylized fox and a crescent moon, drawn in clean, bold linework. The fox is depicted with elegant, flowing lines, surrounded by delicate foliage and wispy forest elements. The overall color direction is muted earth tones (sage green, terracotta, slate blue) contrasted against a bright, clean off-white background. Highly detailed, geometric yet organic style, suitable for high-contrast apparel screen printing. Flat vector graphic quality, strong silhouette, central framing, symmetrical balance, high contrast.
negative: blurry, noisy, watermark, text, logo, signature, messy, low detail, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, photorealistic, gradient, depth of field, bokeh
